demographics.living_situation: lives at home with her spouse

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Spouse calling] Please help — she's burning up, her heart is beating out of her chest, she won't stop sweating, and she's screaming at people who aren't there! She has a thyroid problem and she stopped her tablets a while back.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She's got worse and worse over the last day — high fever, racing heart, and now she's confused and seeing things. I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on over about the last 24 hours and has got dramatically worse
symptom_narrative.character: a high fever with drenching sweats, a heart that feels like it is going to explode, and she has become agitated and confused — she is now talking to and shouting at people who are not there
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the spouse says it is frightening — she cannot be settled and cannot follow what he says
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — she feels hot everywhere and her chest is pounding
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps escalating on its own; trying to hold her still makes her more distressed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lots of sweating, severe nausea, several episodes of watery diarrhoea, and a hand tremor; she had a cough over the last few days
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot sit still, pacing frantically, unable to follow simple instructions

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: propranolol (a tablet for her heart racing)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse is present and made the call; the home is chaotic and he is struggling to keep her calm and safe

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer taken by a distressed carer

objective_data_offered.value: flushed, drenched in sweat, extremely restless and pacing; hands visibly trembling; shouting at people who are not present
her heart is racing so hard he can see it pounding in her chest; she is soaked with sweat and very hot to touch
she has been vomiting-sick and has had several episodes of watery diarrhoea; she had a cough over the past few days
the house is in disarray from her agitation; the spouse says she cannot be safely contained
